violations.text: The doors throughout the facility are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Multiple cold hold units were observed not operational at the time of inspection. All cold hold units must be turned on and maintained at 41 DF or less for the next inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
Hot water was not available at multiple sinks at the time of inspection. All sinks must have hot running water for the next inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
